name: T-2 eight ts rules: 8 g-ts-* rules ship across the generated-code-quality-standards tree per §7 T-2
command: n=$(grep -rE 'id: g-ts-' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards" 2>/dev/null | grep -oE 'g-ts-[0-9]+' | sort -u | wc -l | tr -d ' '); [ "$n" -eq 8 ] && echo "ts_rules=$n" 1>&2
